steps.t: The odour seems to be wafting from the southern area of the great tree-lined courtyard in Nud-melek. Svanr wants you to investigate the odour that occ…
The odour wafts from the courtyard's southern edge in Nud-melek. You should examine the second source of the odour.
The odour wafts from the courtyard's southern edge in Nud-melek. You should examine the third source of the odour.
